title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that humans cannot win a race competing with AI on knowledge accumulation, and that true intelligence in the age of AI lies in curiosity, human judgment, and creative discovery rather than information retention. He invokes the legacy of mathematician Ramanujan to illustrate how unconventional genius and intellectual intuition remain distinctly human strengths.
